productName: Journeyman CBC Watermelon Lemonade (100mg THC/50mg CBC)
description: A crisp sweet-tart lemonade drink that tastes like it was mixed at a tiny craft soda bar — flavorful, refreshing, and infused for a smooth edible-style ride. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect. Sip slowly and let the hybrid infusion settle in at its own pace.
